programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: Moe's protegee, Mary Padian, gives new buyer Jenny Grumbles a run for her money; Ricky learns a lesson in human anatomy; Bubba seeks a buyer for his explicit art.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy and Rene team up in an attempt to stop Darrell and Brandon's planned buying spree; a date reignites Jarrod and Brandi's passion for purchasing storage units.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The ladies from Vegas meet Dave, who promptly takes their locker away; Kenny uses Mary as a shield, and the two find their way to a decent unit of their own.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: A Texas visitor makes a surprise appearance in Upland, Calif.; Jarrod and Brandi hope that small finds will net them big profits; Ivy ends his terrible day with a bang.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny happens upon a familiar vehicle and follows it all the way to Lancaster for an auction; Rene tries to find new luck, after losing in Vegas; Lisa tries to make up for last time; the Calvins look to a higher power for their profit.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi and Jarrod split up; Ivy hires a new employee to take care of the shop; Darrell finds success again; Rene learns how to strip.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Emily deals with an all-male day in Paramount, Calif.; Justin seeks Ivy's guidance with his vintage Cadillac parts; Kenny speaks up during the auction, and quickly regrets it.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Kennebunk, Maine, a motorist gets into a dangerous confrontation with road workers; on a Texas highway off ramp, a stunned driver swerves to avoid a man who was ejected from his car moments earlier during an accident.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A New York City driver gets into a brutal street fight with an electric unicycler after allegedly cutting him off; a motorcyclist risks his own life to help a driver with a stalled car get off the highway.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: An entitled district attorney in New York gets contentious with police after a speeding infraction; a motorist blinded by the sun in California launches his SUV over a cliff; a dispute involving ex-girlfriends in Georgia.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Florida motorcyclists fight with an angry driver and find themselves staring down the barrel of a gun; a semitruck is no match for high-speed winds from a tornado; an elderly woman appears to be taking her motorized scooter cross-country.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Whether it's losing control behind the wheel, going the wrong way on the highway or driving under the influence, these drivers are headed for disaster.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A Wisconsin driver melts down over a $10 seatbelt ticket; a fender bender in Indiana leads to punches and gunfire; in San Diego, an attempted carjacking is thwarted by a group of bystanders.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Apollo Beach, Fla., a woman brandishes a gun after an alleged altercation on the road; after a wild chase through downtown Los Angeles, a man attempts to flee from police on a skateboard.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Vernon, Calif., a motorcyclist escalates an altercation on the road by smashing a driver's rear windshield; when a driver in Flushing, N.Y., allegedly blocks a mobility van from unloading wheelchair passengers, bystanders intervene.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A small plane in California makes an emergency landing on train tracks, with a train quickly approaching; a man in Kansas makes things difficult for a driver attempting to squeeze into a parking spot; police in Texas struggle to apprehend a runaway beast; an American tourist fights with two local drivers in Vietnam; a motorcyclist in Canada gets caught up in an altercation between two motorists.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A car owner in Indiana opens fire at a pickup truck charging toward him in his driveway; a tight lane change prompts a motorcyclist to strike a car's mirror; police in Brazil engage in a harrowing pursuit of a couple on a motorcycle.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A 60-year-old driver in Florida is attacked by a teen; a fight erupts on a street in England after a cyclist confronts a driver about using his cell phone; a Salt Lake City driver goes airborne; a Texas motorcyclist falls onto train tracks.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A Bronx driver gets a heavy dose of instant karma; a woman in Long Beach, Calif., finds herself in a standoff against an entire parking lot in an attempt to hold an empty spot; an allegedly stolen Maserati leads to a tragic end.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: At a red light in Phoenix, a man gets out of his car to confront another motorist, who ends up driving directly into him; when a large truck slows traffic on a small road in New Jersey, an angry driver gets out of his car with a baseball bat.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Florida, a road rage dispute turns violent; a misunderstanding between cyclists and bikers in Australia causes a heated clash; in Albania, an angry restaurant owner clings to the hood of a car as he smashes through the windshield.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Denver, a wayward driver nearly destroys her car trying to get out of a tight spot; an out-of-control semi in Utah wreaks havoc; in Scotland, a fender bender becomes violent; a motorcyclist in Michigan is pursued by a road raging driver.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A driver pulls out a machete and a pedestrian hurls a trash can during a heated altercation in NYC; a suspect in Ocala, Fla., leads police on a destructive high-speed off-road chase; a woman is horrified when a swarm of bees surround her vehicle.

programme.desc: What do Britain's sharpest armchair critics think of Virgin Island, The Four Seasons, Race Across the World, The Piano, I Kissed a Boy and Prue Leith's Cotswold Kitchen.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers settle in for Celebrity Bake Off, The Dog House, Saturday Night Live UK, Britain's Got Talent, Celebrity Sabotage, BBC News on Easter eggs and more.

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Jess and Ben explore a non-monogamous lifestyle in the hot tub with Olivia and Gage, where Jess faces a big fear. And Kirsty and Tom consider attending a huge orgy.

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The epic adventure reality contest continues. The Predators ruthlessly round on one player and cracks form in a friendship. As politics and power plays kick in, who'll be culled next.

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Charlotte Church and Nabil Abdulrashid dig into the week's news with Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Southend, Dan and Jacqui offer up fine dining, while Hannah and Lucy make a startling discovery in a bedroom, and Simon and Edyta face some provocative questions.

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Some extra brunch as Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer host the food and chat show.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: In Stratford-upon-Avon, George Clarke helps Laura and Jonnie to transform their mock-Tudor Edwardian house. And in Essex, Nicki's 1920s cottage needs major changes.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Mike Bubbins in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam becomes a commercial spokesperson and gets romantically involved with his glamorous agent, but things grow complicated when he wants to leave.

programme.title: Storm & Alexis
programme.desc: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

programme.title: Live Snooker: Tour Championship
programme.desc: Snooker's top 12 players compete for the title in the final stop before the World Championships. Reigning champion John Higgins takes on fellow class of '92 star Mark Williams.

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Jules Hudson hosts the show that helps people find the hidden treasure in their home to sell at auction and make a dream come true.

programme.title: Live Snooker: Tour Championship
programme.desc: Reigning champion John Higgins plays Mark Williams to a conclusion for a place in the Quarter Finals against Mark Selby, live from Manchester Central. Katie Shanahan presents.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: When a little girl's pony suffers a nasty injury, Peter Wright must perform emergency al fresco surgery. And a pet tortoise requires a stomach tube to give him food and medication.

programme.title: The Teacher
programme.desc: As Helen grapples with the news of Dee's suicide, she finds herself trapped in a pressure cooker as Cressida makes a move to destroy Helen's reputation for good.

programme.title: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programme.desc: Investigators seek a fare dodger thought to be scamming Transport for London with over £5,000 in unpaid fares. And a man caught without a valid ticket proves uncooperative.

programme.title: Call the Bailiffs: Time to Pay Up
programme.desc: Following the work of agents executing writs on behalf of people desperate to recover money owed. In Coventry, agents call in the police when a tenant becomes threatening.

programme.title: Police Code Zero: Officer Under Attack
programme.desc: Shocking first hand video and testimony from brave officers facing the most dangerous situations. PC Davey and his dog face up to a man armed with several knives.

programme.title: Car Pound Cops
programme.desc: Police investigate a series of Polish number plates, and find that a foreign vehicle is being used in the UK without road tax. Traffic police request a vehicle seizure from a car park.
